message:
fix: use correct mail address for daemon plugin dispatch to dogs

The daemon handler was sending plugin instruction mail to "dog/{name}" but
the correct dog mail address is "deacon/dogs/{name}". This caused all daemon
plugin dispatches to fail with "invalid recipient" errors, meaning dogs were
started with work assigned but never received plugin instructions via mail.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -256,7 +256,7 @@ func (d *Daemon) dispatchPlugins(mgr *dog.Manager, sm *dog.SessionManager, rigsC
 		// Send mail with plugin instructions.
 		msg := mail.NewMessage(
 			"daemon",
-			fmt.Sprintf("dog/%s", idleDog.Name),
+			fmt.Sprintf("deacon/dogs/%s", idleDog.Name),
 			fmt.Sprintf("Plugin: %s", p.Name),
 			p.Instructions,
 		)
